title: Dodds, Anneliese  - Minister for Development at the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office and Minister for Women and Equalities at the Department for Education - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Dodds left her roles at the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office and at the Department for Education in February 2025.  Committee Member, Königswinter  Ms Dodds sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Königswinter. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in May 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
